## reference · prefers-reduced-motion
* The `prefers-reduced-motion` media query detects whether the user has requested the operating system to minimize animation or motion.
* Users may request reduced motion due to motion sickness or personal preference.
* Supported browsers: Chrome 74, Edge 79, Firefox 63.
* Use `prefers-reduced-motion` to design a motion-reduced variant of your site for users who have expressed this preference.

Sources: https://web.dev/articles/prefers-reduced-motion
